name: altitude-tools
description: Altitude Wealth Management Platform — plugins for client onboarding, code development, integration analysis, and implementation planning

plugins.name: m62-altitude-onboarding
plugins.description: Extract entity data from household document folders and onboard to the Altitude wealth management platform. Reads PDFs, images, spreadsheets — extracts individuals, trusts, accounts, insurance, tangible assets, liabilities, and relationships.

plugins.name: m62-code-primer
plugins.description: Generate focused codebase briefings for the Altitude platform. Primes agents or developers on architecture, domain context, patterns, key files, and gotchas for a specific domain area.

plugins.name: m62-integration-analysis
plugins.description: Analyze an external API and map its entities/fields to the Altitude domain model. Produces field-level mapping tables and structured analysis docs.

plugins.name: m62-plan
plugins.description: Altitude-specific implementation planner. Analyzes domain impact, discovers codebase patterns, writes reviewable plans, and waits for approval before implementation.
